resources.string: Shown while Rec is capturing your screen.
Microphone permission is required for microphone capture.
Screen capture permission was not granted.
Screen capture permission was revoked by the system.
Failed to start the Android recorder.
There is no active recording to stop.
The Android recording could not be finalized.
The Android screen capture service is unavailable.
Failed to acquire the Android recording session.
Failed to create the Android virtual display.
Android uses MediaProjection for full-screen capture and saves recordings in the app movies folder. Per-window capture, desktop filtering, and Apple-specific codecs are not available.
